human-review.evidence: Delegated autonomous drive. FINAL feature. Reviewed: 7-REQ composition spec that ALSO fixed a real shipped defect (newWorkspaceFromTemplate never reported → silent workspace loss for ALL templates, repaired via SliceDeps reportAssignment), the cockpit generator + single-gesture flow, 5-lens review (findings 005-010) all resolved incl. 2 e2e test-authoring defects (e2e now WITNESSED 7/7 green) + the focus-into-terminal fix, CONV-054..056. Suite 1447 green. Follow-ups: CONV-018 spec-prose amendment (REQ-005 frozen), NUL cleanup at commit.

escalations.reason: 5-lens review of the final feature: 1 blocker + MEDIUMs/LOW, no contract violations, implementation faithful to all 7 REQs. FINDING-008 (HIGH, tests-origin): the e2e was witnessed (4/6) — 2 test-authoring defects: TEST-677 uses [data-tab-id] during the rename state (tab renders ws-rename- input) so it never reaches 2; TEST-678 hasText:'CK' matches 'cockpit'. Both fixable → 6/6 witnessed (the workspace-loss-fix e2e runs WITHOUT pty). Also FINDING-007 (focus stranded on body after picker-mediated cockpit gesture), FINDING-006/009 (REQ-005 spec prose describes a live-PTY vehicle the tests correctly didn't implement — CONV-018 spec-vs-test residual, structural pins cover it), FINDING-010 (cancel tested from 1 of 4 picker states). Human decision on the loopback.
escalations.decision: Loop back to tests (delegated). Fixes: FINDING-008 — amend the 2 frozen e2e defects (TEST-677: select the tab by a selector valid in the rename state or wait for rename commit before counting tabs; TEST-678: disambiguate the tpl-orky-cockpit locator away from the hasText 'CK'/'cockpit' collision — exact testid/role), then WITNESS the full orky-cockpit e2e 6/6 green. FINDING-007 — the picker-mediated cockpit gesture must leave focus on a sane target (the new cockpit's pane / a stable element), not body; pin + fix. FINDING-010 — add cancel-from-loading/error/empty picker-state coverage. FINDING-006/009 — REQ-005's live-PTY acceptance prose is a documented residual: the tests correctly pin saved-file argv/layout (not live pty, per FINDING-017); record in 04-tests.md that the structural/argv pins are the honest vehicle and the live-terminal sub-assertion is env-gated, accept as residual (do NOT chase the native rebuild — winpty's build script is broken in this checkout, a separate human toolchain fix). LOW: FINDING-010 pin; the NUL file (CONV-050) commit deliberately as a git rm --cached in doc-sync/commit.

implementer.reason: Loopback fix cycle, single implementer (focus fix + e2e defects were tests-phase).

loopbacks.reason: 1 blocker (008 e2e test defects) + 007 focus + 010 coverage; 006/009 residual; per ESC-001
